title: dennstaedtia straminea
intro: Dennstaedtia straminea, also known as the fern-like plant, is a species of fern belonging to the Dennstaedtiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Dennstaedtia straminea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
